organic.snippet: Step 1: Gather Documents Early · Step 2: Prepare Your Application Package · Step 3: Schedule an Appointment · Step 4: Pay Passport Acceptance & Processing Fees.

organic.title: How do I get my first U.S. passport?
organic.snippet: Step 1: Complete the US Passport Application Form. You may complete the passport application form online and print it single-sided on 8.5”x11” paper.

organic.title: How to Get a U.S. Passport (First-Time & Renewal Guide)
organic.snippet: Step 1: Complete Form DS-11 · Step 2: Gather required documents · Step 3: Get a passport photo · Step 4: Apply in person.

organic.title: Application for U.S. Passport
organic.snippet: Ask Questions About Your Application: Call 1-877-487-2778 (1-888-874-7793 or email NPIC@state.gov. Email PassportWeb@state.gov

organic.title: U.S. Passports - Travel.gov
organic.snippet: You can apply for a passport at post offices, local government offices, and libraries. Some facilities have special events on evenings and ...

organic.title: Apply for a new adult passport
organic.snippet: You must apply in person at a passport acceptance facility for a new passport. It cannot be done online or by mail. You will need Form DS-11.

organic.title: How to Apply for a U.S. Passport for the First Time (Step-by-Step Guide ...
organic.snippet: In this comprehensive, step-by-step guide, I'll walk you through everything you need to know to successfully apply for your first US passport.

organic.title: PAFL - Passport Acceptance Facility Locator | U.S. Department of State

peopleAlsoAsk.question: How much does it cost for a US citizen passport?
How can I apply for a passport by myself?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: Visit Passport Seva Portal https://passportindia.gov.in Page 3 Register yourself as new user by creating User Id. Provide User Id details and click Register. E-mail Id is mandatory, registration confirmation mail will be sent to your e-mail Id.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: Can I apply for a passport at my local Post Office?
peopleAlsoAsk.snippet: Passports. Thousands of Post Offices™ accept first-time passport applications for the U.S. Department of State.

peopleAlsoAsk.question: What is the easiest way to apply for a passport?
